title: GEEPAS Illuminating Electric Glass Kettle | 1.7L Cordless Jug Kettle with Stainless Steel Heating Element Auto Shut Off Boil-dry Sensor | Safety Locking Lid Cord Storage | 2 Year Warranty 2200W White
features: ✅ FAST BOIL IN UNDER MINUTES-Enjoy rapid boiling power with a 2200W concealed heating element that brings water to a boil in just moments—perfect for tea, coffee, or instant meals. Electric kettle is ideal for busy mornings or quick hydration throughout the day.

✅ MODERN LED ILLUMINATED DESIGN-Add a touch of elegance to your kitchen with the stylish blue LED illumination that lights up the glass kettle while boiling. Not only functional, it visually signals when water is ready. The clear glass body lets you enjoy the calming glow and monitor water levels at a glance.

✅ SAFE, SMART & RELIABLE OPERATION-Boil with confidence thanks to automatic shut-off and advanced boil-dry protection. The portable kettle stops heating when the water reaches boiling point or if the tank is empty. Safety comes first—making it perfect for families, students, and the elderly.

✅ 1.7L LARGE CAPACITY FOR ALL OCCASIONS-Brew up to 8 cups in one go—ideal for entertaining guests or fuelling your day. Whether you're hosting, relaxing, or meal prepping, this large-capacity fast boil kettle meets your daily hot water needs with ease. The clear water gauge ensures precise filling every time.

✅ CORDLESS POURING WITH 360° BASE-The detachable quiet boil kettle sits on a 360° swivel base, making it perfect for left- and right-handed users. Enjoy the freedom of cordless pouring straight to your mug or teapot. Cord storage underneath keeps your countertop clean and tidy.

✅ ERGONOMIC & MESS-FREE POURING-Designed with a cool-touch easy-grip handle and precision spout for a controlled pour—no drips or spills. Electric cordless kettle serves hot water safely and effortlessly every time. The wide one-touch lid opening makes refilling just as simple.

✅ BUILT TO LAST WITH PREMIUM MATERIALS-Coffee kettle is crafted from durable borosilicate glass and BPA-free components for pure-tasting water with every boil. The stainless steel heating plate and filter resist scaling for long-lasting clarity and freshness.

✅ EASY-CLEAN DESIGN WITH REMOVABLE FILTER-Keep every cup fresh with a built-in removable limescale filter that ensures pure-tasting water and cleaner pours. The wide opening of quick boil kettle makes it easy to access the interior for thorough cleaning, helping maintain performance and hygiene with minimal effort.
description: Product Description 1.7 L WATER CAPACITY Comes with a large capacity to make up to 8 drinks from just one fill, perfect for families and busy households. EASY TO OPEN LID Designed with a simple one touch, push button opening lid, enabling you to quickly open with one hand when you want to refill your kettle. BOIL-DRY PROTECTION Automatic shut off function upon boiling and the boil-dry protection prevents it boiling if there is insufficient water present. CORD STORAGE To keep the kitchen tidy, the base has integrated cord storage so it can be tidied away at your convenience. BLUE ILLUMINATED LED LIGHT Sleek and stylish design with clear housing, give you a precise observation with water volume and boiling process, and while the glass kettle will illuminate blue during heating water - An elegant addition to your kitchen.
